history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal O is at row 04 column D, but the direct path to the right from my current position leads into lava at row 02 column C, so I cannot go forward safely. I should turn clockwise to face down and then move toward the open path below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, so moving forward is the best next step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down. The cell in front at row 04 column B is safe, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D, so I should continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, but the cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, and there is lava at row 04 column C, so I should not go straight right. I need to turn left or right to reorient toward a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe available reorientation to avoid the lava and the wall is to turn clockwise, which will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am back at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. To make progress toward the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding the lava at C, I need to reorient; turning counter-clockwise from down will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right again. The cell ahead is lava at row 04 column C, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to the right, but lava blocks the direct path, and the only safe way to change direction here is to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To continue navigating around the lava toward the goal, I should turn counter-clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell ahead is lava at row 04 column C, so moving forward would be deadly. The goal is at row 04 column D, but it is blocked by lava directly in front, so I should turn clockwise to face down and look for an alternate route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To make progress, I should turn counter-clockwise to face right and then re-evaluate the path around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell ahead is lava at row 04 column C, so I cannot move forward safely. The goal is to the right but blocked by lava, so I need to change direction and try the upper route. Turning counter-clockwise will face me up toward row 03 column B, which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead, row 03 column B, is safe, and moving forward advances me toward the open path above the lava. I should go forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe, so moving forward continues me along the left side toward the goal column without touching lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up, and the cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to turn right and then go around the lava through the open cells.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must avoid moving forward there. To navigate safely toward the goal, I should turn clockwise to face down and use the open path below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
